description: Rich sentence-pair positive-vs-negative sentiment steering intended to produce more visible Gemma 4 shifts than the minimal Love/Hate demo.

samples.label: sample_1
samples.user_prompt: Write a one-sentence opinion about waiting in line at the DMV.
samples.baseline: Waiting in line at the DMV is an exercise in patience tested by bureaucratic inefficiency.
samples.post_activation: Waiting in line at the DMV is an exercise in patience, albeit one that is often severely tested by bureaucratic inefficiency.
samples.pre_activation: Waiting in line at the DMV is an exercise in patience, albeit one that can test one's resolve.

samples.label: sample_2
samples.user_prompt: Write a one-sentence opinion about getting stuck in traffic on a Monday morning.
samples.baseline: Getting stuck in Monday morning traffic is a frustrating way to start the week.
samples.post_activation: Getting stuck in Monday morning traffic is a frustrating way to start the week.
samples.pre_activation: Getting stuck in Monday morning traffic is a frustrating way to start the week.

samples.label: sample_3
samples.user_prompt: Write a one-sentence opinion about waiting through airport security during a holiday rush.
samples.baseline: Waiting through airport security during a holiday rush is an exercise in patience tested by the sheer volume of travelers and the mounting stress of a busy travel period.
samples.post_activation: Waiting through airport security during a holiday rush is an exercise in patient endurance rewarded by the excitement of travel.
samples.pre_activation: Waiting through airport security during a holiday rush is an unavoidable, albeit sometimes frustrating, rite of passage to travel.
